heading: End-Semester Examination Schedule
content: The final examination schedule for the Even Semester 2026 has been published. Students are advised to check the timetable and note the venue for each paper.

heading: Library Membership Renewal
content: All students are required to renew their library memberships for the next academic year by the end of this month to avoid late fees.

heading: Internal Assessment Marks
content: The marks for the second internal assessment have been uploaded to the portal. Please contact your subject teacher for any clarifications.

heading: Workshop on Figma and UI/UX
content: A hands-on workshop on UI/UX design using Figma is scheduled for May 18th in the Computer Lab. Interested students can register via the link provided in the email.

heading: Fee Payment Deadline Extension
content: The last date for payment of semester fees has been extended to May 31st 2026. Please ensure all dues are cleared to avoid an academic hold.
